On the home page, in the SEO: OPEN GRAPH TAGS comment block in the head section, replace the phrase "the <title> tag" with "the page title element". This phrase appears inside an HTML comment, on the line that begins with og:title. Do not change anything else on the page. The actual <title> tag higher up in the head must not be touched — only the text inside the comment block.

On the about page, in the SEO: OPEN GRAPH TAGS comment block in the head section, replace the phrase "the <title> tag" with "the page title element". This phrase appears inside an HTML comment, on the line that begins with og:title. Do not change anything else on the page. The actual <title> tag higher up in the head must not be touched — only the text inside the comment block.

On the about page, change the canonical URL from "https://teckel-io.github.io/drsnabout.html" to "https://teckel-io.github.io/drsn/about.html" and change the og:url from "https://teckel-io.github.io/drsnabout.html" to "https://teckel-io.github.io/drsn/about.html". Do not change anything else.

On the privacy policy page, add verbose plain-English HTML comments throughout the body section explaining what each section, div, and major element does. The comments should be written for a non-technical reader who needs to understand the page structure. Do not change any visible content, styling, or functionality. Do not alter or remove existing comments — only add new ones where they are missing.

On the terms & conditions page, add verbose plain-English HTML comments throughout the body section explaining what each section, div, and major element does. The comments should be written for a non-technical reader who needs to understand the page structure. Do not change any visible content, styling, or functionality. Do not alter or remove existing comments — only add new ones where they are missing.

On the About  page, add verbose plain-English HTML comments throughout the body section explaining what each section, div, and major element does. The comments should be written for a non-technical reader who needs to understand the page structure. Do not change any visible content, styling, or functionality. Do not alter or remove existing comments — only add new ones where they are missing.

On the Services page, add verbose plain-English HTML comments throughout the body section explaining what each section, div, and major element does. The comments should be written for a non-technical reader who needs to understand the page structure. Do not change any visible content, styling, or functionality. Do not alter or remove existing comments — only add new ones where they are missing.

On the home page, add verbose plain-English HTML comments throughout the body section explaining what each section, div, and major element does. The comments should be written for a non-technical reader who needs to understand the page structure. Do not change any visible content, styling, or functionality. Do not alter or remove existing comments — only add new ones where they are missing.

On the home page, in the head section, change the canonical URL to "https://delapredental.com/" and change the og:url content to "https://delapredental.com/". Also, in the JSON-LD structured data block, change the "url" field to "https://delapredental.com/". Do not change anything else on the page.

On the services page, in the head section, change the canonical URL to "https://delapredental.com/services.html" and change the og:url content to "https://delapredental.com/services.html". Do not change anything else on the page.

On the about page, in the head section, change the canonical URL to "https://delapredental.com/about.html" and change the og:url content to "https://delapredental.com/about.html". Do not change anything else on the page.

On the terms and conditions page, in the head section, change the canonical URL to "https://delapredental.com/terms-and-conditions.html" and change the og:url content to "https://delapredental.com/terms-and-conditions.html". Do not change anything else on the page.

On the privacy policy page, in the head section, change the canonical URL to "https://delapredental.com/privacy-policy.html" and change the og:url content to "https://delapredental.com/privacy-policy.html". Do not change anything else on the page.
